ranked_matches.title: IPL 2026: Royal Challengers Bengaluru vs Sunrisers Hyderabad
Australia U20 vs China U20 Friendly (AFC U20 Asian Cup Prep)

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is currently live on Day 4. The IPL 2026 opener between RCB and SRH is also live. There are no scheduled matches for the AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025, as it concluded in 2025; however, the Australia U20 team is playing a friendly match against China U20 today.
